market_summary: S&P 500 closed above 7,600 for first time (chip boom: Marvell +30% on Huang praise). Crypto crashed hard: BTC below $70K (-11% 7d), ETH below $2K, MSTR -5.85% on first BTC sale since 2022 (sold 32 BTC). Gold/silver corrected: XAU ranged $4,487-$4,520, XAG held $74.97-$76.22. Oil volatile: Brent ~$91, WTI ~$92, US-Iran Hormuz talks uncertain.
key_events_tomorrow: ADP Non-Farm Employment (Wed Jun 3): consensus 110K jobs added
JOLTS Job Openings (Tue Jun 2): released today, expect 6.87M
ISM Manufacturing (Mon Jun 1): already released, week started
US-Iran Strait of Hormuz negotiations: Trump says MoU within a week
No FOMC this week (next meeting Jun 16-17)
overnight_risks: US-Iran Hormuz talks collapse -> oil spike -> risk-off cascade
BTC ETF outflows continue (May: -$2.3B net, largest monthly outflow 2026)
Alphabet $80B equity raise -> tech dilution fears
ADP miss could signal labor market weakness -> recession fears
Asia markets may react to US crypto weakness

instrument_news.BTC-USD: Below $70K. $1B crypto liquidations. ETF outflows $2.3B in May (worst 2026). 45% below ATH $126.2K. MSTR sold 32 BTC first time since 2022.
instrument_news.ETH-USD: Breached $2K support, hit $1,963 intraday. Trending-down since $2,500 rejection. L2 fragmentation narrative headwind.
instrument_news.MSTR: Crashed 5.85% to $149.78. First BTC sale (32 BTC/$2.5M) spooked market. Still holds 843,706 BTC. Analyst cut PT 20%. High-beta BTC proxy amplifying downside.
instrument_news.XAU-USD: Ranged $4,487-$4,520. JP Morgan targets $5K by Q4 2026. Central banks buying 585t/quarter. Late June potential inflection zone per historical analogs.
instrument_news.XAG-USD: Held $74.97-$76.22. Silver prophecy intact. Gold-silver ratio compression thesis playing out. Industrial demand (solar/EV/AI) supportive.

metals_outlook: Bullish medium-term. Central banks buying 585t/quarter gold (structural). JP Morgan $5K Q4 target. Late June may be inflection zone. Silver benefits from industrial demand + ratio compression. Near-term correction risk: $4,300-$4,725 range for June per analysts.
oil_outlook: Highly volatile. Brent fell 20% from 2026 peak on Iran ceasefire hopes, then bounced. Trump says Hormuz MoU within a week. If talks fail: full Hormuz + Bab el-Mandeb closure threat. Brent ~$91, WTI ~$92. Remains sensitive to geopolitics.
sentiment_shift: Risk-off day. Crypto sentiment extreme fear (F&G 23). Stocks mixed (S&P ATH vs individual selloffs). Flight to safety thesis weakened for gold today (corrected alongside crypto). Oil is the wildcard — Hormuz resolution would be deflationary, failure would be inflationary.
